labacts.name: Division Algorithm
labacts.description: Computes the quotient and remainder for two positive integers using the division algorithm.

labacts.name: Euclidean Algorithm
labacts.description: Finds the greatest common divisor (GCD) and least common multiple (LCM) of two positive integers using the Euclidean algorithm.

labacts.name: Collatz Sequence
labacts.description: Generates the Collatz sequence for a positive odd integer. If odd, multiply by 3 and add 1. If even, divide by 2, until reaching 1.

labacts.name: Fibonacci Sequence
labacts.description: Generates the Fibonacci sequence for a given number of terms. Supports both positive (F(0) to F(n-1)) and negative (F(n) to F(-1)) ranges.

labacts.name: Lucas Sequence
labacts.description: Generates the Lucas sequence for a given number of terms. Supports both positive (L(0) to L(n-1)) and negative (L(n) to L(-1)) ranges.

labacts.name: Tribonacci Sequence
labacts.description: Generates the Tribonacci sequence for a given number of terms. Supports both positive (T(0) to T(n-1)) and negative (T(n) to T(-1)) ranges.

labacts.name: Palindrome Checker
labacts.description: Checks whether a given text is a palindrome. Automatically ignores spaces, punctuation, and case differences.

inputs.label: Enter Text
inputs.placeholder: e.g. racecar, A man a plan a canal Panama
